task.title: Switch dashboard-server log WS to SDK followLogs

events.content: Replaced standalone /ws/logs tailing with SDK followLogs: Replaced standalone /ws/logs tailing with SDK followLogs

raw.question: Replaced standalone /ws/logs tailing with SDK followLogs
raw.chosen: Replaced standalone /ws/logs tailing with SDK followLogs
raw.reasoning: Centralizes log follow semantics in SDK so dashboard and other consumers share one implementation (history bootstrap, incremental polling, unsubscribe, missing-log handling).

retrospective.summary: Switched dashboard-server standalone log websocket path to SDK followLogs with resubscribe support and cleanup on close/error; removed local delta-tail helper; typecheck/tests/build all pass.
